query:
UPDATE users SET email = $2, name = $3, password_hash = $4, phone = $5,
               picture_url = $6, age = $7, address = $8, role = $9::text::user_role,
               status = $10::text::user_status, is_verified = $11, expertise = $12,
               bio = $13, updated_at = $14
               WHERE id = $1
